title: macrothelypteris bukoensis
intro: Macrothelypteris bukoensis is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Macrothelypteris bukoensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it in decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
